description: Seeding the initial elastic principal graph prior to starting the trajectory learning process.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.SeedEPGStructure GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.SeedEPGStructure is a GenePattern module that Seeding the initial elastic principal graph prior to starting the trajectory learning process.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 14 parameters:
- Required: data.file, num.components, num.clusters, preference.percentile, max.clusters, figure.legend.num.columns, output.filename, clustering, component.x, component.y
- Optional: percent.neighbor.cells, damping, figure.width, figure.height

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/structure_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <percent.neighbor.cells> <figure.width> <figure.height> <figure.legend.num.columns> <num.clusters> <damping> <preference.percentile> <max.clusters> <clustering> <component.x> <component.y> <num.components>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_seedepgstructure\:0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing annotated and preprocessed gene expression data

parameters.name: num.components
parameters.description: Number of components to be plotted.

parameters.name: percent.neighbor.cells
parameters.description: Neighbor percentage. The percentage of points used as neighbors for spectral clustering.

parameters.name: num.clusters
parameters.description: Number of clusters (only valid once 'clustering' is specificed as 'sc' or 'kmeans').

parameters.name: damping
parameters.description: Damping factor (between 0.5 and 1) for affinity propagation.

parameters.name: preference.percentile
parameters.description: Preference percentile (between 0 and 100). The percentile of the input similarities for affinity propagation.

parameters.name: max.clusters
parameters.description: Number of clusters (only valid once 'clustering' is specificed as 'sc' or 'kmeans').

parameters.name: figure.legend.num.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns that the legend has.

parameters.name: clustering
parameters.description: Clustering method used to infer the initial nodes. Choose from affinity propagation, K-Means clustering, spectral clustering
